data.body: Progress (2026-06-16): The Langfuse-tracing AC is DONE and CI-validated — ephemeral self-hosted stack (docker-compose.langfuse.yml) + trace round-trip test (tests/external/test_llm_trace.py) green in the external-integration 'langfuse-trace' job; this also surfaced+fixed the v4-SDK trace-id capture and a _trace double-yield bug (shipped in 0.5.1). MCP tool-session AC: the substantive invariant ('a downed MCP server does NOT silently yield zero tools') is now ENFORCED + offline-tested — _mcp_tools wraps load failures in a clean LLMRunnerError and refuses to run tool-less silently (commit 4ac2e43d); stateless re-spawn is by construction (fresh MultiServerMCPClient per review). REMAINING to fully close: a real-MCP-server end-to-end test (a tiny stdio MCP server fixture) to exercise positive tool-loading + session lifecycle live; offline negative-path coverage is in place.
